abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Mantra of Rage
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model declares the Prepare action, enemies within (n)2" must pass a TN 15 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

abilities.name: Mind's Eye
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with an attack action, if this model has an Insight token, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated

actions.name: Heavenly Gada
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may lower the Dmg of this action by 1. If this model chose to lower its Dmg, an ally in LoS gains an Insight token.

triggers.name: Query the Aether
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model draws a card for each scheme the opponent has revealed (to a maximum of 2 cards).

triggers.name: From the Heavens
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Shraap
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3. The target gains one of the following tokens, plus one for each raise this action receives: Staggered, Burning, Injured, or Slow.

actions.name: Arcane Storm
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage. If this action receives a raise, enemy models that fail this duel gain a Slow token.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.
